name: Ubiquiti Fiber OLT XGS
title: Ubiquiti Fiber OLT XGS
short_description: Optical Line Terminal, 4x 25G SFP28 ports, 1U, 10 Gbps uplink/downlink speeds
description: The UISP Fiber OLT XGS serves as a critical component in fiber optic networking infrastructure, primarily used for Optical Line Termination (OLT) in fiber-to-the-home (FTTH), fiber-to-the-building (FTTB), and fiber-to-the-premises (FTTP) deployments. This device enables network operators to deliver high-speed internet access, voice, and video services to end-users with exceptional reliability and performance.

detailed_description.heading: 8-port Optical Line Terminal
detailed_description.text: The UISP Fiber OLT XGS serves as a critical component in fiber optic networking infrastructure, primarily used for Optical Line Termination (OLT) in fiber-to-the-home (FTTH), fiber-to-the-building (FTTB), and fiber-to-the-premises (FTTP) deployments. This device enables network operators to deliver high-speed internet access, voice, and video services to end-users with exceptional reliability and performance.

detailed_description.heading: Features
detailed_description.text:
XGSPON 10 Gbps bi-directional capacity
(8) 10G SFP+ OLT ports
(4) 25G SFP28 uplink ports
1U Rack mount
2048 Client capacity
AC/DC power module redundancy support
(2) Hot-swappable power supply ports

detailed_description.heading: Hardware and Connectivity
detailed_description.text: At its core, the UISP Fiber OLT XGS boasts a comprehensive hardware suite, featuring eight XGS/XG/GPON ports and four 1/10/25G SFP28 ports*. These interfaces provide versatile connectivity options for upstream and downstream traffic, supporting high-speed data transmission and broadband connectivity for residential, commercial, and industrial applications. Additionally, the UISP Fiber OLT XGS is equipped with a management interface comprising Ethernet out-of-band, Ethernet in-band, and an RJ45 serial console port, facilitating seamless configuration and monitoring tasks. Furthermore, Bluetooth capabilities enhance connectivity for management operations, enhancing user experience and efficiency.

detailed_description.heading: Power and Environmental Specifications
detailed_description.text: Powered by a universal AC input mechanism compatible with 100–240V AC, 50/60 Hz, and equipped with two hot-swappable AC/DC PSUs, the UISP Fiber OLT XGS ensures reliable operation in diverse power environments. With a maximum power consumption of 70W and a factory reset button for quick device management, it delivers energy-efficient performance and streamlined operation. Designed to withstand harsh environmental conditions, the UISP Fiber OLT XGS operates within an ambient temperature range of -10 to 45°C (14 to 113°F) and ambient humidity of 10 to 95% non-condensing.

detailed_description.heading: Use Cases
detailed_description.text: Enterprises and organizations can leverage the UISP Fiber OLT XGS to establish high-performance fiber optic networks within their premises. Educational institutions, universities, and large campuses can deploy it to create robust fiber optic networks. Municipalities and local governments can integrate it into their smart city initiatives. Internet service providers (ISPs) and wireless internet service providers (WISPs) can utilize it to expand their network infrastructure and deliver high-speed broadband services.

items.name: Power Supply
items.value: Internal x2 redundant PSU, External AC/DC Adapter
